name: timegraph-cortex
description: Automatic memory for Claude Code via temporal graph + vector retrieval. Backend (Neo4j + Qdrant) is brought up by `timegraph init` after `pipx install timegraph-mcp`. See README for the architecture (bounded-1-LLM-call retriever + transparent ingest/recall hooks).

plugins.name: timegraph-cortex
plugins.description: Automatic context recall: every Claude Code turn is ingested into a temporal graph, every prompt is augmented with relevant prior memory. Prerequisite: `pipx install timegraph-mcp && timegraph init`.
